title: Built a Stock Market API Serving 72.9M Requests with 95ms Latency
author: Kindly_Term4749
selftext:
After months of work, I've grown my financial data API to:

- 72.9M API requests
- 95ms average latency
- 0.02% error rate
- 476K+ users

It provides:

- Real-time stock quotes
- Historical market data
- Financial statements
- Company fundamentals
- Forex & crypto data
- Market news and analytics

I originally built it because I was tired of piecing together multiple providers just to get the data needed for one application.

If you're building a trading app, portfolio tracker, fintech product, or market research tool, I'd love to hear your thoughts.

API:
https://rapidapi.com/manwilbahaa/api/yahoo-finance127
